name: ai-gamedev
description: Monorepo for ai_gamedev: shared library, API server, and web app.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @ai-gamedev/server && npm run build --workspace @ai-gamedev/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @ai-gamedev/server" "npm run dev --workspace @ai-gamedev/web"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @ai-gamedev/server
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @ai-gamedev/web
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
